falsification.test_audit: All 11 ACs have dedicated acceptance tests. AC2/AC3/AC5 use fake sendmail capture scripts — no tautology. AC4 uses two-channel mpsc priority ordering. AC8 tests filter at the decision boundary. AC9 checks service unit ExecStart path against .local/bin/wm-reach.
falsification.panic_audit: No unwrap/expect in production paths (src/). Transport errors are encoded in DeliveryResult, not panicked. anyhow::Context used throughout. Clippy -D warnings passed clean including unwrap_used and expect_used deny.
falsification.unsafe_audit: No unsafe code. deny(unsafe_code) at crate root. undocumented_unsafe_blocks deny clean.
falsification.drift_audit: Intent card ACs 1-11 all have test coverage. No AC left untraced. Feature-gating for ntfy/webhook verified in AC7.
falsification.public_api_audit: Transport trait is the public API boundary. DeliveryResult is sole output type. Config types have custom Debug impls omitting credentials.
falsification.deps_audit: cargo deny check bans/licenses/sources passes. Core deps: tokio, clap, anyhow, serde/serde_json, agorabus (path dep). All MIT/Apache-2.0.

counter_attack.description: Injected sendmail exit-1 to verify AC5 delivered=false. Verified AC8 filter does not skip events from other sessions. Verified AC4 distress queue empties before normal queue.
